diagrams.title: OSPF Network Topology with Areas
diagrams.description: Shows backbone Area 0 connected to multiple areas (Area 1, Area 2, NSSA) with ABRs and ASBR
diagrams.purpose: Understanding OSPF area design and hierarchical routing

diagrams.title: OSPF Neighbor State Machine
diagrams.description: State transitions from Down to Full adjacency formation

diagrams.title: DR/BDR Election on Multi-access Network
diagrams.description: Shows Ethernet segment with 4 routers - DR, BDR, and two DROTHERs
elements: All form adjacency only with DR and BDR
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how DR reduces O(n²) adjacency problem

diagrams.title: OSPF Packet Flow Between Neighbors
diagrams.description: Shows the 5 OSPF packet types and their exchange sequence

diagrams.title: LSA Type Flow Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows generation and propagation of different LSA types across areas
diagrams.purpose: Understanding LSA scope and propagation rules
